_note: FALLBACK DATA — researched snapshot, not live. Replace at runtime via Google Places API (New) once GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY + place_id are set. See src/lib/places.ts.

reviews.author: Ananya Sahu
reviews.text: Mesmerising ambiance inside Magneto Mall. The Mr. Mateos arancini and Burmese khow suey are must-tries. Staff happily suggested the right dishes.

reviews.author: Vikram Patel
reviews.text: Spacious, family-friendly and great for a fusion dinner. KungFu rolls were delicious. A touch on the pricey side but the experience makes up for it.

reviews.author: Megha Agrawal
reviews.text: Loved the mocktails — cranberry virgin sangria is so refreshing. Oriental and continental options are all pure veg, which is rare and wonderful.

reviews.author: Sahil Dewangan
reviews.text: Good portion sizes and a lovely setting for a weekend outing with family. Paneer tikka and hummus platter were both very good.

reviews.author: Ishita Rao
reviews.text: Came expecting Indore quality and mostly got it. Black rice was excellent. Service was prompt and friendly throughout.
